query: SELECT pn.id, pn.title, pn.projectId, pn.isVisibleToClient, p.name as projectName, c.firstName, c.lastName FROM projectNotes pn JOIN projects p ON pn.projectId = p.id JOIN contacts c ON p.contactId = c.id ORDER BY pn.id;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway06.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2hQLtGFTQQF4sFv.root --database gixQA33Udhd38D2dSPdEnX --execute SELECT pn.id, pn.title, pn.projectId, pn.isVisibleToClient, p.name as projectName, c.firstName, c.lastName FROM projectNotes pn JOIN projects p ON pn.projectId = p.id JOIN contacts c ON p.contactId = c.id ORDER BY pn.id;
